title: Empathy: Authenticity
description: Structured conversion of the legacy authenticity slides.

sources.label: Carl Rogers, On Becoming a Person

slides.title: Authenticity
slides.body: Congruence: your inner response and outward stance are aligned.
bullets: Makes repair possible when you miss.
Uses genuineness in service of the client's process.

slides.title: Helpful therapist lines
slides.body: Authenticity is most useful when it is brief, clean, and returned to the client.
items: I may be off. What fits better?
I want to check if I am with you.
Can we slow down and stay with what is here?
I think I missed something important.
I notice uncertainty in me, and I want to check it.
